title: leea angulata
intro: Leea angulata, also known as the Himalayan leea or Indian leea, is a plant species belonging to the family Leeaceae. Traditionally, Leea angulata has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Leea angulata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
